title: Standardized Falls Screening for Home Care Agencies

seo.title: Falls Prevention for Home Care Agencies | Able Care
seo.description: Standardized falls screening for home care agencies. Reduce client falls, standardize care across branches and caregivers, and improve customer conversion.

blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Older woman using the Able Assess sensor at home
blocks.headline: Standardized falls screening for home care agencies.
blocks.subtitle: Reduce client falls. Standardize care across branches and caregivers. Improve customer conversion.

blocks.heading: Technology built for the frontline
blocks.body: Able Assess was designed for the caregiver's day, not the IT department's roadmap. Five minutes at the kitchen table. No clinical certification required. Run it during a routine visit or an introductory meeting — the report is ready immediately.
blocks.imageAlt: Caregiver running an Able Assess screening with a client at home

blocks.heading: How it works in home care

steps.title: Capture
steps.description: A caregiver runs a five-minute assessment on any phone during a routine visit or introductory meeting.

steps.title: Score
steps.description: Able Assess compares grip strength, sit-to-stand, gait speed and timed up-and-go against normative data instantly.

steps.title: Act
steps.description: The risk report is immediately available to refer the client to preventative care or update the care plan.

steps.title: Track
steps.description: Longitudinal trends surface decline early, helping reduce hospitalizations and keep clients independent for longer.

blocks.heading: Four metrics, one picture of function

metrics.name: Grip strength
metrics.description: Full body strength proxy. Predicts all-cause mortality and hospitalization risk.

metrics.name: Sit-to-stand
metrics.description: Lower-limb power and balance. A key indicator of fall likelihood.

metrics.name: Gait speed
metrics.description: Walking speed over a standardized 4-metre distance. Linked to rehospitalization rates.

metrics.name: Timed Up and Go
metrics.description: Falls risk in under a minute. Validated across home and clinical settings.

blocks.heading: The numbers that matter to home care

stats.label: Reduction in falls with objective screening
Clinical certifications required to run it

testimonials.quote: It paid for itself in the first quarter.

blocks.heading: Common questions from home care operators

items.question: What hardware do we need?
items.answer: The sensor, pouch and measuring tape are all provided as part of the kit. Everything pairs via Bluetooth with any smartphone or tablet. No additional infrastructure required.

items.question: Can non-clinical staff run the assessment?
items.answer: Yes. Able Assess was built for non-clinical staff. The protocol guides them through every step. No training course required.

items.question: What devices does it work on?
items.answer: Any smartphone or tablet — iOS or Android. Caregivers can run it on the phone they already carry.

items.question: How does it integrate with our existing systems?
items.answer: Able Assess is integration ready with EHRs and other risk monitoring platforms. The clinical team can walk you through the setup during a demo.

items.question: Where is the data stored?
items.answer: ISO 27001 certified, HIPAA aligned, GDPR compliant. Data residency options available for US and UK.

blocks.heading: See Able Assess in your workflow.
blocks.body: Book a presentation with a clinician who has run it in the field.
